# SSKUMED-Shortcourse

This is a SSKUMED shortcourse for version control and collaboration with
Github

[![R-CMD-check](https://github.com/ikarus702/SSKUMED-Shortcourse/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml/badge.svg)](https://github.com/ikarus702/SSKUMED-Shortcourse/actions/workflows/R-CMD-check.yaml)

# Package index

## Functions

- [`bar()`](https://ikarus702.github.io/SSKUMED-Shortcourse/reference/bar.md)
  : Bar function
- [`foo()`](https://ikarus702.github.io/SSKUMED-Shortcourse/reference/foo.md)
  : Foo Function to Create a Fancy List
- [`hello()`](https://ikarus702.github.io/SSKUMED-Shortcourse/reference/hello.md)
  : Hello Function
